notes: Class 2-to-Class 0 transition requires emergency confirmation, triple-hit, or deterministic E001-E005 emergency evidence.
LLM candidate prompt text alone must not trigger Class 0.

LLM-mode allowance (scenario_manifest_rules.md §7.5): the literal expected_selected_candidate_id ('C3_EMERGENCY_HELP') and prompt ('긴급상황인가요?') ARE stable across modes because the LocalLlmAdapter normalizes any LLM-emitted CLASS_0 candidate to the fixed _FIXED_EMERGENCY_CANDIDATE template. The LLM may decide whether to include an emergency option but never what it says. Verifiers may therefore use the literal id even in llm_generated mode.
